name: logitropic-plugins
description: Directory of popular Claude Code extensions including development tools, productivity plugins, and MCP integrations

plugins.name: conductor
plugins.description: Conductor is a Claude Code plugin that allows you to specify, plan, and implement software features.

plugins.name: build-ios-apps
plugins.description: Build iOS apps with workflows for SwiftUI UI work, refactors, performance audits, and simulator debugging.

plugins.name: build-macos-apps
plugins.description: Build, run, test, debug, instrument, and implement local macOS apps using Xcode, SwiftUI, AppKit interop, unified logging, and shell-first desktop workflows.

plugins.name: game-studio
plugins.description: Design, prototype, and ship browser games with guided 2D and 3D workflows, asset pipelines, and playtesting support.

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: Inspect repositories, triage pull requests and issues, debug CI, and publish changes through a hybrid GitHub connector and CLI workflow.

plugins.name: xcode-tools
plugins.description: Let agents access your project and Xcode capabilities using the Model Context Protocol.
